name: get-exo-mailboxes-with-forwarding
title: Get Exchange Online Mailboxes Configured With Email Forwarding
shortDescription: This script identifies all Exchange Online mailboxes configured with email forwarding and exports the results to a timestamped CSV report.
longDescription: The script uses Exchange Online app-only authentication, classifies forwarding as internal or external, and exports mailbox forwarding details for governance, compliance, and operational review.

thumbnails.alt: Preview of the sample Get Exchange Online Mailboxes Configured With Email Forwarding

references.name: Exchange Online PowerShell module
references.description: Learn how to connect to Exchange Online and use Exchange Online PowerShell cmdlets.
